title: cryptantha calycosa
intro: Cryptantha calycosa, also known as Purple Sandverbena, is a flowering plant species in the borage family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of glycosides and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Cryptantha calycosa include its potential to reduce inflammation, fight infections, and promote wound healing, as well as its use in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Cryptantha calycosa can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in herbal remedies to support respiratory health and soothe skin irritations.
